name: Connect Meta Business Assets
description: Guide user through connecting Meta/Facebook business assets to their dashboard.

steps.instruction: Make sure you are logged in to Meta Business Suite.
steps.fallback: Go to business.facebook.com and log in with your business Facebook account.

steps.instruction: Click Business Settings in the left sidebar.
steps.fallback: Look for Business Settings in the left navigation panel.

steps.instruction: In the left sidebar, click Connected apps.
steps.fallback: In Business Settings left sidebar, scroll down to find Connected apps.

steps.instruction: Find the access token or developer credentials section.
steps.fallback: Look for Developer or Token in the current section. You may need to scroll.

steps.instruction: When the token is visible, copy it manually. Do not share it with anyone.
steps.fallback: Click Generate or Copy when the token appears, then copy it manually.

steps.instruction: Return to your AI Flow dashboard and paste the token in the field shown.
steps.fallback: Switch back to your dashboard tab and find the token input field.
